working_on: Mechanize MemPalace usage across all session types (build + routine): PostToolUse-hook telemetry + validate.py checks (soft-warn boot query/diary read; hard-fail diary write with escape hatch) + routine-mode SKILL/ops-doc fix to include diary write + pushback/lesson capture in step 11; parameterize audit_archive_structured_fields.py for the mempalace_activity field; new ADR + first-exercise readiness note. Closes Issues #27 and #20.
declared_scope: Files modified: .claude/settings.json (PostToolUse matcher); .gitignore (current_mempalace.jsonl); engine/tools/hooks/post-mempalace-tool-use.sh (new); engine/tools/validate.py (3 new categories); engine/tools/audit_archive_structured_fields.py (parameterize); engine/tools/scan_mempalace_activity.py (new rollup tool); engine/tools/migrate_diary_skipped_archive_field.py (new one-shot); .claude/skills/session-build-lifecycle/SKILL.md + engine/operations/session-build-lifecycle.md (annotation); .claude/skills/routine-mode-lifecycle/SKILL.md + engine/operations/routine-mode-operations.md (insert steps 5.5, 5.6 + fix step 11 enumeration); engine/operations/mempalace-operations.md (new section); engine/operations/soft-warn-lifecycle.md (categories); CLAUDE.md (mechanization bullet); engine/adr/0056-mempalace-mechanical-adoption-checks.md (new ADR); engine/build_readiness/mempalace_mechanical_adoption_first_exercise.md (new). Recovery (Part B per plan) deferred to S-0079+. phase: NA-prep (Phase 6 prereq close)

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope landed in full. Four-layer mechanism (PostToolUse hook, rollup tool, validate.py --final-check, parameterized structural audit) all in place. Routine-mode-lifecycle SKILL + ops-doc updated with steps 5.5/5.6 inserted and step 11 enumeration fixed (Issue #27 root cause). Build-mode SKILL/ops-doc steps 3 and 3b annotated. Shutdown SKILL/ops-doc gets new step 0 + step 1 amended. mempalace-operations.md new section. soft-warn-lifecycle.md notes. CLAUDE.md mechanization bullet. ADR 0056 + first-exercise readiness note. 32 archives migrated via diary_skipped rename (preserving formatting and UTF-8). 62 new pytests; 757 total pass. T1-A first-exercise gate passed at this shutdown — validate.py --final-check ran cleanly with 0 hard-fails after the PostToolUse hook captured this session's MemPalace MCP calls (search=1, diary_read=1, diary_write=1, add_drawer=3, total_calls=6). Issues #27 and #20 closed via gh CLI + auto-close on commit message. Recovery (Part B per plan at ~/.claude/plans/use-of-mempalace-by-velvety-pebble.md) deferred to S-0079+ as planned — bounded historical cleanup, independent of mechanism landing. No descope, no reorder, no in-flight scope expansion.

issues_closed.title: Routine-mode shutdown skips MemPalace diary write + pushback/lesson capture (silent — diary_skipped not recorded either)
health_check.py archive-history audit pass for ADR 0042 / ADR 0049 structured fields

side_discoveries.reasoning: The 'deferred to S-0079+' phrase in the deliverable commit message refers to Recovery (Part B) of the approved plan at ~/.claude/plans/use-of-mempalace-by-velvety-pebble.md. The deferral is documented in the plan's Sequencing section ('Do mechanization first, recovery second') with a clear forward pointer; Recovery is also named in the next-session-work-item block of STATE.md as optional parallel work in S-0079+. No further surface needed — the plan IS the surface.

commits.summary: eager-claim S-0078 — mechanize MemPalace usage across all session types + close Issues #27 and #20
feat(mempalace): mechanize MemPalace adoption checks across all session types (ADR 0056)

outcome_summary: MemPalace mechanical adoption checks land per ADR 0056. Closes Issues #27 (12/16 Phase 5 routine sessions silently skipped diary write, confirmed mechanically by S-0077 audit; root cause was the routine-mode-lifecycle SKILL step 11's SUBSET enumeration omitting diary write + pushback/lesson capture asks) and #20 (parameterize audit_archive_structured_fields.py to declarative REQUIRED_ARCHIVE_FIELDS so future structured-field ADRs add a row, not a code change). End-to-end mechanization across interactive AND routine modes via four layers: PostToolUse hook on mcp__mempalace__.* writes per-session JSONL telemetry to engine/session/current_mempalace.jsonl; scan_mempalace_activity.py rolls it up into mempalace_activity archive field at shutdown step 0; validate.py --final-check (gated CLI flag) reads the rollup and emits two soft-warns (mempalace_boot_query_skipped, mempalace_diary_read_skipped) plus one hard-fail (mempalace_diary_write_skipped) with mempalace_unavailable_acknowledged: <reason> escape hatch downgrading to mempalace_diary_write_acknowledged_skip; audit_archive_structured_fields.py parameterized with mempalace_activity declared since-S-0078 (plus mode since-S-0048 per ADR 0051). Companion fixes per Option C: routine-mode-lifecycle SKILL gets steps 5.5/5.6 inserted between eligibility selection and plan authoring; step 11 explicitly re-enumerates diary write + pushback/lesson capture asks. Build-mode SKILL/ops-doc steps 3 + 3b annotated with mechanical-backstop notes. Shutdown SKILL/ops-doc step 0 + step 1 amended. mempalace-operations.md new 'Mechanical adoption checks' section. soft-warn-lifecycle.md notes the new categories. CLAUDE.md mechanization bullet. New ADR 0056 + first-exercise readiness note per ADR 0053. Field migration: pre-S-0078 self-recorded diary_skipped renamed to mempalace_diary_write_skipped across 32 archives via surgical text-based migration preserving formatting and UTF-8 (initial json.dumps approach silently re-escaped Unicode; took two iterations + last-key-strip-prior-comma edge case fix). 62 new pytests; 757 total pass. T1-A first-exercise gate passed at this shutdown — settings.json hook reload happened mid-session, the PostToolUse hook captured 6 MemPalace MCP calls (search=1, diary_read=1, diary_write=1, add_drawer=3 for ADR 0056 decision drawer + 2 lesson drawers), validate.py --final-check ran cleanly with 0 hard-fails (the four-layer mechanism composes correctly). T1-B (routine first-exercise) closes at next routine fire post-S-0078. Recovery (Part B per plan) of lost MemPalace content S-0032 → S-0077 deferred to S-0079+ as planned. Two-commit pattern (eager-claim 80b8d83 + deliverable ee49636 + this close). Lessons captured in MemPalace lessons room: json.dumps default ensure_ascii=True silently re-escapes Unicode in committed files (use surgical text-replacement); pytest hangs silently when validate.py imported inside test function (import at module level matching test_validate_routine_mode.py pattern). Forward state: S-0079 = OQ-DEC1-A/C/D settlement (only remaining Phase 6 master plan prereq); Phase 6 master plan shifts to S-0080+; Recovery (Part B) optional parallel work in S-0079+.
